name: Rubick
description: No sorcery lies beyond my grasp.

abilities.name: Telekinesis
abilities.description: Utilizes his telekinetic powers to lift the enemy unit into the air briefly, then hurls them back at the ground. The affected unit lands on the ground with such force that it stuns other enemy units within the radius. Both and the cannot be lifted. However, the ability applies stun during the lift duration, then applies the landing ability effects within the radius afterward. Cast Range: 550/575/600/625. Stun Radius: 300/325/350/375. Lift Duration: 0.95/1.2/1.45/1.7. Landing Time: 0.3. Cooldown: 22/19/16/13. Mana Cost: 110.

abilities.name: Fade Bolt
abilities.description: A powerful stream of arcane energy that travels between enemy units, dealing damage and reducing their attack damage. Each bolt bounce instance deal lesser damage. Cast Range: 800. Bounce Radius: 440. Number of Bounces: Base. Damage: 100/175/250/325. Bounce Damage Factor: 0.94. Attack Damage Reduction: 5%/15%/25%/35% (8%/18%/28%/38%). Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 110/125/140/155.

abilities.name: Arcane Supremacy
abilities.description: Rubick's mastery of the arcane allows him to have a larger cast range and increased potency. Cast Range Bonus: 60/120/180/240. Spell Damage Amp: 11%/16%/21%/26%.

abilities.name: Spell Steal
abilities.description: Increases cast range and the number of acquirable abilities. Cast Range: 1000 (1400). Steal Duration: 180/240/300. Debuff Duration Factor: 1.1/1.2/1.3. Cooldown Reduction Bonus: (50%). Spell Damage Amp: (40%). Cooldown: 20/12/4. Mana Cost: 25.
